meta.title: Contextualized Physical Data: The Missing Piece For Situational Awareness
meta.description:
Haakon Mørk on S4x22's Stage 2: Technical Deep Dives makes the case that showing system criticality and other contextualized physical data needs to be provided to the SOC. He provides examples and approaches to creating, accessing and providing this data. 

And he contends the data is so large it needs to be done in the cloud, which draws some questions. Q&A begins at 16:40.
